findings.title: Unsafe JSON parsing in comparator scoreComparison
findings.issue: JSON.parse without try-catch on LLM response. Non-null assertion on regex match group.
findings.suggestion: Wrap in try-catch, handle both fenced and plain JSON responses
findings.impact: Comparison runs fail with cryptic parse errors

findings.title: Strict regex in parseGeneratedEvals requires newlines
findings.issue: Regex requires \n after opening fence and before closing fence. LLMs sometimes omit trailing newline.
findings.suggestion: Make newlines optional in regex: \n? instead of \n
findings.impact: Valid JSON not parsed when LLM omits newline before closing fence

findings.title: Unhandled promise rejection in config error path
findings.issue: detectAvailableProviders() in catch block can throw, creating unhandled promise rejection
findings.impact: Server crash on double failure during config detection

findings.title: Auto-generated assertion ID in evals.json
findings.issue: Assertion ID 'assert-1773002043217' is auto-generated timestamp, not human-readable
